externalDocs.description: RouterOS Manual — MPLS MTU, Forwarding and Label Bindings

comment.description: Short description of the interface (string value)

disabled.description: If set to yes then this configuration is ignored.

input.description: Whether to allow MPLS input on the interface

interface.description: Name of the interface or interface-list to match.

mpls-mtu.description: The option represents how big packets can be carried over the interface with added MPLS labels.

externalDocs.description: RouterOS Manual — MPLS MTU, Forwarding and Label Bindings

comment.description: Short description of the interface (string value)

disabled.description: If set to yes then this configuration is ignored.

input.description: Whether to allow MPLS input on the interface

interface.description: Name of the interface or interface-list to match.

mpls-mtu.description: The option represents how big packets can be carried over the interface with added MPLS labels.

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties to return
parameters.name: .proplist

distribute-for-default.description: Defines whether to map label for the default route.

hop-limit.description: Max hop limit used for loop detection. Works in combination with the loop-detect property.

loop-detect.description: Defines whether to run LSP loop detection. Will not work correctly if not enabled on all LSRs. Should be used only on non-TTL networks such as ATMs.

lsr-id.description: Unique label switching router's ID. (A.B.C.D    (IP address))

path-vector-limit.description: Max path vector limit used for loop detection. Works in combination with the loop-detect property.

preferred-afi.description: Determining which address family connection is preferred. Value is also set in dual-stack element (if used).

transport-addresses.description: Specifies LDP session connections origin addresses and also advertises these addresses as transport addresses to LDP neighbors.

use-explicit-null.description: Whether to distribute explicit-null label bindings.
